'''Yin Wood Ox''' is the 2nd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 乙 Kinoto (yin wood, the luna-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 丑 Ushi, the [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's wood overcomes the branch's earth, a relationship of restraint.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Wood Rat]] (node 1) and [[Yang Fire Tiger]] (node 3).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoto (乙)]] — yin wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] — yin earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Wood Rat]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Fire Tiger]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q599762}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
